seoTitle: Kunjin vs Kununurra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kunjin and Kununurra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kunjin and Kununurra.
heading: Kunjin vs Kununurra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kunjin, Western Australia and Kununurra, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kununurra has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Kunjin (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kunjin or Kununurra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kunjin has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kununurra scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kunjin scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Kununurra scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kunjin or Kununurra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kununurra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
